artifact_refs.description: Manual notebook used to build the Home Credit TC1 human baseline.
Run-level metadata for the re-authored Home Credit human baseline.
Links each selected bank action to notebook evidence and mapping rationale.
Author notes for the Home Credit human baseline.
Full-bank review workbench used during final manual TC1 action selection.

notes: Observed TC1 human bank-selection run after full-bank manual review. The selected add-side list records one human pass under the same action-bank constraints used for agents and is no longer restricted to notebook-faithful bank mappings.
